open-pdf-page-count.title: Open PDF and Get Page Count
open-pdf-page-count.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF file from disk using Aspose.Pdf.Document and retrieving the number of pages.

open-pdf-from-stream.title: Open PDF from Stream and Save to File
open-pdf-from-stream.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF document from a FileStream and saving it to another file using default settings.

open-protected-pdf.title: Open Password-Protected PDF Without Password and Handle Exception
open-protected-pdf.description: Demonstrates opening a password‑protected PDF without providing a password and catching the InvalidPasswordException.

save-pdf-to-memorystream.title: Save PDF to MemoryStream and Write to File
save-pdf-to-memorystream.description: Loads a PDF, saves it into a MemoryStream, and then writes the stream contents to a file.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑1b with Metadata Preservation
convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b.description: Demonstrates converting an existing PDF to PDF/A‑1b format while preserving document metadata using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdfx3-with-color-profile.title: Export PDF as PDF/X-3 with Color Profile Preservation
export-pdfx3-with-color-profile.description: Shows how to save a PDF document as PDF/X-3 using PdfX3SaveOptions while preserving the original color profile.

encrypt-pdf-restrict-print.title: Encrypt PDF with Passwords and Restricted Printing
encrypt-pdf-restrict-print.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with user and owner passwords while disabling printing permissions.

decrypt-pdf.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF
decrypt-pdf.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with the user password, decrypt it, and save an unprotected copy.

add-blank-page.title: Add Blank Page to PDF
add-blank-page.description: Demonstrates how to open an existing PDF, add a new blank page, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

insert-pdf-page.title: Insert PDF Page into Another PDF at Specific Position
insert-pdf-page.description: Shows how to load two PDFs, take a page from one document and insert it into another document at a given position using the Pages.Insert method.

remove-third-page.title: Remove Third Page from PDF
remove-third-page.description: Shows how to delete the third page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and save the updated file.

split-pdf-into-pages.title: Split PDF into Individual Pages Using Document.Split
split-pdf-into-pages.description: Demonstrates how to split a multi‑page PDF into separate one‑page PDF files using the Document.Split method in a loop.

batch-convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A‑1b
batch-convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder, converts each to PDF/A‑1b compliance, and saves the results to an output directory.

encrypt-pdf-network-stream.title: Encrypt PDF from Network Stream and Write Back to Stream
encrypt-pdf-network-stream.description: Loads a PDF from a network stream, encrypts it with user and owner passwords, and writes the secured PDF back to an output stream.

create-pdf-three-pages-pdfx3.title: Create PDF with Three Pages and Save as PDF/X‑3
create-pdf-three-pages-pdfx3.description: Creates a new PDF document, adds three blank pages, converts it to PDF/X‑3 compliance, and saves the result.

load-pdf-byte-array-update-title.title: Load PDF from Byte Array, Update Title Metadata, and Save
load-pdf-byte-array-update-title.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a byte array, changing its title metadata, and saving the modified document to disk.

open-pdf-disable-font-embedding.title: Open PDF with LoadOptions to Disable Font Embedding
open-pdf-disable-font-embedding.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF using custom load options that disable font embedding and then saving the document.

save-pdf-incremental-update.title: Save PDF with Incremental Update after Adding Pages
save-pdf-incremental-update.description: Loads an existing PDF, appends a new page, and saves the document using incremental update to preserve the original content.

compress-pdf-compare-size.title: Compress PDF and Compare File Sizes
compress-pdf-compare-size.description: Loads a PDF, applies default resource optimization to compress it, saves the result, and prints the original and compressed file sizes.

export-pdf-pages.title: Export Each PDF Page as Separate PDF Files
export-pdf-pages.description: Loads a PDF and saves each page as an individual PDF file using a loop.

load-pdf-set-version.title: Load PDF from MemoryStream, set version to 1.4, and save
load-pdf-set-version.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a MemoryStream, creating a new document with PDF version 1.4, copying pages, and saving it to disk.

encrypt-pdf-form-fill-only.title: Encrypt PDF with Form Filling Only Permission
encrypt-pdf-form-fill-only.description: Encrypts a PDF allowing only form filling while disabling content extraction.

create-pdfa1b-with-paragraph.title: Create PDF/A‑1b Document with Text Paragraph
create-pdfa1b-with-paragraph.description: Creates a new PDF, adds a text paragraph to the first page using TextBuilder, converts the document to PDF/A‑1b compliance, and saves it.

rotate-second-page.title: Rotate Second Page of PDF
rotate-second-page.description: Opens a PDF, rotates the second page 90 degrees clockwise, and saves the modified document.

update-pdf-author-metadata.title: Update PDF Author Metadata Using FileInfo
update-pdf-author-metadata.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF via a FileInfo object, changing its Author metadata, and saving the changes back to the same file.

batch-encrypt-pdfs.title: Batch encrypt PDFs in a directory
batch-encrypt-pdfs.description: Encrypts all PDF files in a given folder with the same user and owner passwords and saves the encrypted copies to an output folder.

batch-decrypt-pdfs.title: Batch Decrypt Encrypted PDFs
batch-decrypt-pdfs.description: Decrypts all encrypted PDF files in a folder using a shared owner password and saves unprotected copies.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b (Preserve Structure and Fonts)
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.description: Demonstrates converting an existing PDF to PDF/A-1b compliance while keeping the original document structure and embedded fonts.

save-pdf-high-compression.title: Save PDF with High Compression and Compare File Size
save-pdf-high-compression.description: Demonstrates saving a PDF using PdfSaveOptions with a high compression level and reports the size reduction compared to the original file.

open-pdf-from-url.title: Open PDF from URL and Save Locally
open-pdf-from-url.description: Downloads a PDF via HTTP, opens it from the response stream using Aspose.Pdf, and saves it to a local file.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-no-print.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and No Printing Permission
encrypt-pdf-aes256-no-print.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using AES‑256, removing all permissions (including printing), and verifying that printing is disabled.

change-pdf-version-incremental.title: Change PDF Version to 1.5 with Incremental Save
change-pdf-version-incremental.description: Loads a PDF, sets its version to 1.5, and saves it using incremental update to preserve existing content.

change-pdf-passwords.title: Change PDF Passwords
change-pdf-passwords.description: Opens a password‑protected PDF, changes its user and owner passwords, and saves the updated document.

split-pdf-at-page-ten.title: Split PDF into Two Parts at Page Ten
split-pdf-at-page-ten.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into two separate documents at page 10, saving each part with descriptive filenames.

set-pdf-title-verify.title: Set PDF Document Title and Verify
set-pdf-title-verify.description: Opens a PDF, sets its document title metadata, saves the file, and then reopens it to verify the title.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b__v2.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Embedded Fonts
convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b__v2.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PDF/A-1b compliance while embedding any missing fonts using PdfA1bSaveOptions.

batch-convert-pdf-to-pdfa.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b with CSV Logging
batch-convert-pdf-to-pdfa.description: Converts all PDF files in a folder to PDF/A-1b format, writes per‑file conversion logs, and records the results in a CSV file.

rotate-pdf-page-byte-array.title: Rotate PDF Page from Byte Array
rotate-pdf-page-byte-array.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, rotates the fifth page by 180 degrees, and saves the modified document.

encrypt-pdf-view-only.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password (view only)
encrypt-pdf-view-only.description: Encrypts a PDF using a user password, allowing only viewing while preventing editing and copying.

encrypt-allow-form-filling.title: Encrypt PDF allowing only form filling
encrypt-allow-form-filling.description: Opens a PDF, restricts permissions to only allow form filling, encrypts it with AES‑256, and saves the protected file.

batch-split-pdf-pages.title: Batch Split PDF into Individual Page Folders
batch-split-pdf-pages.description: Splits a large PDF into separate one‑page PDFs, each saved in its own folder.

replace-pdf-author.title: Replace PDF Author Metadata with Current User
replace-pdf-author.description: Loads a PDF, updates its Author metadata to the current user name, and saves the modified document.

encrypt-pdf-rc4.title: Encrypt PDF with 128‑bit RC4 and compare file sizes
encrypt-pdf-rc4.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using the 128‑bit RC4 algorithm and verifies that the encrypted file size is slightly larger than the original.

batch-encrypt-pdfs__v2.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Different Passwords
batch-encrypt-pdfs__v2.description: Encrypt multiple PDF files using individual user and owner passwords read from a configuration file, logging success or errors.

convert-pdf-to-pdfx3.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X-3 preserving ICC profiles
convert-pdf-to-pdfx3.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PDF/X-3 format while keeping existing ICC color profiles for accurate printing.

batch-convert-pdfa-compression.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A‑1b with High Compression
batch-convert-pdfa-compression.description: Converts all PDF files in a folder to PDF/A‑1b format, applies resource optimization for high compression, and generates a CSV summary report of original and converted file sizes.

add-xmp-metadata.title: Add Custom XMP Metadata to PDF
add-xmp-metadata.description: Loads a PDF, injects a custom XMP metadata block, and saves the document while preserving its metadata.

encrypt-pdf-owner-password.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password Only
encrypt-pdf-owner-password.description: Encrypts a PDF using an owner password while leaving the user password empty, thereby granting full access to the owner and restricting user permissions.

rotate-pdf-pages-180.title: Rotate All Pages of a PDF by 180 Degrees
rotate-pdf-pages-180.description: Opens a PDF, rotates each page 180 degrees, and saves the result.

encrypt-aes128-high-quality-print.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑128 and enable high‑quality printing
encrypt-aes128-high-quality-print.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑128, set the printing permission to high quality, and verify the permission after opening the encrypted file.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b__v2.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b Compliance
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b__v2.description: Loads a PDF, converts it to PDF/A‑1b compliance, and saves the resulting document.

batch-encrypt-pdfs__v3.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with File‑Based Passwords and Log
batch-encrypt-pdfs__v3.description: Encrypts every PDF in a folder using a password derived from its file name and writes the passwords to a log file.

batch-split-pdf-by-ranges.title: Batch split PDF into sections by page ranges
batch-split-pdf-by-ranges.description: Splits a PDF into multiple files based on page ranges defined in a text configuration file.

encrypt-pdf-form-fill-only__v2.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password, Allow Form Filling Only
encrypt-pdf-form-fill-only__v2.description: Encrypts a PDF using a user and owner password, permits only form filling and disables printing.

set-pdf-document-info.title: Set PDF Document Information (Author, Title, Subject)
set-pdf-document-info.description: Opens a PDF, sets its metadata fields Author, Title, and Subject, saves the file, and reads back the values to verify.

encrypt-pdf-rc4__v2.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 and Verify Permissions
encrypt-pdf-rc4__v2.description: Encrypts a PDF using the RC4 algorithm with no copying permission and then verifies the security settings programmatically.
